# firex

Access the Western Wildfire Resilience Index from R without downloading
the full dataset.

firex connects to 82 wildfire resilience raster layers hosted as
Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFFs (COGs) on the Knowledge Network for
Biocomplexity (KNB). Users can browse the catalog, inspect layer
metadata, and retrieve spatial subsets by bounding box or polygon
boundary — no local storage of the full archive (~25 GB) required.

## Installation

``` r

install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("ignitR-package/firex")
```

## Quick start

``` r

library(firex)
library(terra)

# Browse all 82 available layers
wri_overview()

# Get metadata for a specific layer
layer_info("WRI_score")

# Retrieve the WRI composite score for Santa Barbara County, CA
wri <- get_layer("WRI_score",
                  aoi     = c(-120.7, 34.4, -119.4, 35.1),
                  aoi_crs = "EPSG:4326")

plot(wri, col = hcl.colors(100, "YlOrRd", rev = TRUE))
```

## Core functions

| Function | Description |
|----|----|
| [`wri_overview()`](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/reference/wri_overview.md) | Print a structured summary of all 82 layers |
| [`wri_overview_df()`](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/reference/wri_overview_df.md) | Return the catalog as a data frame for filtering |
| `layer_info(id)` | Retrieve full metadata for a single layer |
| `get_layer(id, aoi, aoi_crs)` | Download a spatial subset of a layer |

[`get_layer()`](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/reference/get_layer.md)
accepts numeric bounding boxes, shapefile or GeoJSON file paths, `sf`
objects, `SpatVector`, `SpatRaster`, and `SpatExtent` as `aoi`. For
inputs without an embedded CRS (numeric vectors and `SpatExtent`),
supply `aoi_crs`.

## Repository structure

    firex/
    ├── R/                    # Package functions
    ├── man/                  # Auto-generated documentation (do not edit)
    ├── inst/
    │   ├── stac/             # Bundled STAC catalog, collection, and item JSONs
    │   └── demos/            # Demo data and example scripts
    ├── tests/testthat/       # Unit tests
    ├── DESCRIPTION           # Package metadata and dependencies
    ├── NAMESPACE             # Exported functions (auto-generated)
    └── README.md

`man/` and `inst/` follow standard R package conventions and are
required by the build system. `man/` is generated by roxygen2 and should
not be edited directly.

## Data

The WWRI dataset is produced by NCEAS and funded by the Gordon and Betty
Moore Foundation. The COG archive is hosted on KNB at
<https://knb.ecoinformatics.org/data/wri-data-processing/cogs/>. A
persistent DOI will be assigned following formal publication of the
underlying dataset.

For dataset documentation, methodology, and an interactive dashboard,
visit the official [Western Wildfire Resilience
Index](https://www.wildfireindex.org/) site.

## Tests

# Package index

## All functions

- [`get_layer()`](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/reference/get_layer.md)
  : Get a WRI raster layer
- [`layer_info()`](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/reference/layer_info.md)
  : Get metadata for one WRI layer
- [`print(`*`<wri_overview>`*`)`](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/reference/print.wri_overview.md)
  : Print a WRI overview summary
- [`query_stac_flexible()`](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/reference/query_stac_flexible.md)
  : Query STAC items flexibly by any property
- [`wri_overview()`](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/reference/wri_overview.md)
  : Read the WRI STAC catalog
- [`wri_overview_df()`](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/reference/wri_overview_df.md)
  : Get WRI catalog as a data frame

# Articles

### Vignettes

- [Discovering Available
  Layers](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/articles/discovering-available-layers.md):
- [Retrieving a Layer by Bounding
  Box](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/articles/retrieving-layer-bounding-box.md):
- [Using Spatial Objects as Areas of
  Interest](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/articles/spatial-objects-aoi.md):
- [Comparing Layers Across
  Domains](https://ignitr-package.github.io/firex/articles/comparing-layers-across-domains.md):
